'''languthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leaderboard|leaderboard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leaderboard|leaderboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| languthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:længithith|længithith]] || [[word:længithij|længithij]] || [[word:længithish|længithish]] || [[word:længithi|længithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:langunguthuth|langunguthuth]] || [[word:langunguthuj|langunguthuj]] || [[word:langunguthush|langunguthush]] || [[word:langunguthu|langunguthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:languthuth|languthuth]] || [[word:languthuj|languthuj]] || [[word:languthush|languthush]] || [[word:languthu|languthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:langufthuth|langufthuth]] || [[word:langufthuj|langufthuj]] || [[word:langufthush|langufthush]] || [[word:langufthuf|langufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:languthuthu|languthuthu]] || [[word:languthuju|languthuju]] || [[word:languthushu|languthushu]] || [[word:languthuku|languthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:languthuth|languthuth]] || [[word:languthuj|languthuj]] || [[word:languthush|languthush]] || [[word:languthu|languthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:languthuthul|languthuthul]] || [[word:languthujul|languthujul]] || [[word:languthushul|languthushul]] || [[word:languthukul|languthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:languthuthuthu|languthuthuthu]] || [[word:languthujuju|languthujuju]] || [[word:languthushushu|languthushushu]] || [[word:languthuku|languthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:languthuthun|languthuthun]] || [[word:languthujun|languthujun]] || [[word:languthushun|languthushun]] || [[word:languthukun|languthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:languthuthuoro|languthuthuoro]] || [[word:languthujuoro|languthujuoro]] || [[word:languthushuoro|languthushuoro]] || [[word:languthukuoro|languthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
